title: acalypha lanceolata var. glandulosa
intro: Acalypha lanceolata var. glandulosa, also known as the glandular acalypha, is a plant species within the family Euphorbiaceae, characterized by its lance-shaped leaves and small, glandular hairs. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Acalypha lanceolata var. glandulosa include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
